issue.message: `FcmPushService` must extend android.app.Service

Use of `REQUEST_IGNORE_BATTERY_OPTIMIZATIONS` violates the Play Store Content Policy regarding acceptable use cases, as described in https://developer.android.com/training/monitoring-device-state/doze-standby.html

Modifier parameter should be the first optional parameter

Switch statement on an `int` with known associated constant missing case `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_ANNOUNCEMENT`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_ASSIST_READING_CONTEXT`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_GESTURE_DETECTION_END`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_GESTURE_DETECTION_START`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_NOTIFICATION_STATE_CHANGED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_SPEECH_STATE_CHANGE`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_TOUCH_EXPLORATION_GESTURE_END`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_TOUCH_EXPLORATION_GESTURE_START`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_TOUCH_INTERACTION_END`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_TOUCH_INTERACTION_START`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_ACCESSIBILITY_FOCUSED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_ACCESSIBILITY_FOCUS_CLEARED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_CLICKED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_CONTEXT_CLICKED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_FOCUSED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_HOVER_ENTER`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_HOVER_EXIT`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_LONG_CLICKED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_SCROLLED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_SELECTED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_TARGETED_BY_SCROLL`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_TEXT_CHANGED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_TEXT_SELECTION_CHANGED`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_VIEW_TEXT_TRAVERSED_AT_MOVEMENT_GRANULARITY`, `AccessibilityEvent.TYPE_WINDOWS_CHANGED`

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).

Use of this function is discouraged because resource reflection makes it harder to perform build optimizations and compile-time verification of code. It is much more efficient to retrieve resources by identifier (e.g. `R.foo.bar`) than by name (e.g. `getIdentifier("bar", "foo", null)`).
"momento" is a common misspelling; did you mean "memento"?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="disclosure_point5_desc">Puedes pedir tiempo extra, reportar problemas y tus padres pueden ajustar o desactivar los controles en cualquier momento.</string>

issue.message: "momento" is a common misspelling; did you mean "memento"?
issue.errorLine1: <string name="transparency_access_desc">Puedes ver esta información en cualquier momento desde el menú principal de la app.</string>

issue.message: "Momento" is a common misspelling; did you mean "Memento"?
Formatting %d followed by words ("minutos"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("minutos"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
issue.errorLine1: <string name="extra_time_used">Ya usaste %1$d minutos de tu tiempo extra</string>

issue.message: Formatting %d followed by words ("minutos"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("minutos"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
Formatting %d followed by words ("minutos"): This should probably be a plural rather than a string
`checkClientTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
issue.errorLine1: override fun checkClientTrusted(chain: Array<out X509Certificate>?, authType: String?) {

issue.message: `checkServerTrusted` is empty, which could cause insecure network traffic due to trusting arbitrary TLS/SSL certificates presented by peers
issue.errorLine1: override fun checkServerTrusted(chain: Array<out X509Certificate>?, authType: String?) {

issue.message: Implementing a custom `X509TrustManager` is error-prone and likely to be insecure. It is likely to disable certificate validation altogether, and is non-trivial to implement correctly without calling Android's default implementation.

The attribute `android:fullBackupContent` is deprecated from Android 12 and higher and may be removed in future versions. Consider adding the attribute `android:dataExtractionRules` specifying an `@xml` resource which configures cloud backups and device transfers on Android 12 and higher.

Do not place Android context classes in static fields (static reference to `AnalyticsManager` which has field `context` pointing to `Context`); this is a memory leak
This field leaks a context object

issue.errorLine1: <string name="app_purpose">Ayuda a tu familia a usar dispositivos de forma segura</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.disclosure_title` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.disclosure_title_alt` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.disclosure_subtitle` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="disclosure_subtitle">Esta app necesita tu permiso para ayudarte</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.disclosure_subtitle_alt` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="disclosure_subtitle_alt">Lo que necesitas saber antes de empezar</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.disclosure_point1_title` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="disclosure_point1_title">📱 Monitorea el uso de apps</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.disclosure_point1_desc` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="disclosure_point1_desc">Ve qué apps usa tu hijo y cuánto tiempo pasa en cada una. Esto incluye saber qué apps están abiertas y activas.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.disclosure_point2_title` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.disclosure_point2_desc` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="disclosure_point2_desc">Para bloquear apps y mostrar avisos, esta app usa el permiso de Accesibilidad de Android. Esto permite detectar qué apps están en uso y actuar sobre ellas.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.disclosure_point3_title` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="disclosure_point3_title">📤 Comparte información con tus padres</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.disclosure_point3_desc` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="disclosure_point3_desc">Los datos de uso se guardan de forma segura y solo son visibles para tu familia. Nadie más puede ver esta información.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.disclosure_point4_title` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.disclosure_point4_desc` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="disclosure_point4_desc">Esta app no tiene modo oculto. Siempre sabrás que está funcionando. Tú también puedes ver qué se comparte con tus padres.</string>

issue.message: The resource `R.string.disclosure_point5_title` appears to be unused
The resource `R.string.disclosure_point5_desc` appears to be unused
issue.errorLine1: <string name="disclosure_point5_desc">Puedes pedir tiempo extra, reportar problemas y tus padres pueden ajustar o desactivar los controles en cualquier momento.</string>

The resource `R.string.disclosure_consent_question` appears to be unused

issue.message: Replace "-" with an "en dash" character (–, –) ?
Replace "-" with an "en dash" character (–, –) ?
Should explicitly set `android:icon`, there is no default
Use the KTX extension function `String.toUri` instead?
Use the KTX extension function `SharedPreferences.edit` instead?

Use version catalog instead
Use version catalog instead (com.google.android.play:integrity is already available as `play-integrity`, but using version 1.1.0 instead)
Use version catalog instead
Use the existing version catalog reference (`libs.ktor.client.okhttp`) instead
